---
title: "Mortality Trial on Wescott Oysters"
description: "Weekly and Daily leftovers"
categories: ["Aquaculture"] #choose "Aquaculture", "Computing", "Epigenetics", "Genomics", "Lab Updates", "Reading Notes", "Transcriptomics"
#citation: 
date: 06-04-2026
image: "images/clipboard-3935626096.png" # finding a good image
author:
  - name: Steven Roberts
    url: 
    orcid: 0000-0001-8302-1138
    affiliation: Professor, UW - School of Aquatic and Fishery Sciences
    affiliation-url: https://robertslab.info
  #url:  # self-defined
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
format:
  html:
    toc: true            # ← enable TOC
    toc-location: left   # or: right, body
    toc-depth: 3         # how many heading levels to show
    code-fold: FALSE
    code-tools: true
    code-copy: true
    highlight-style: github
    code-overflow: wrap
#runtime: shiny
---

<img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/AI%20Use-L0%20None-lightgrey" alt="AI Use Level 0"/>

We had some leftover oyster from Wescott Bay Weekly and Daily primed.

Started Mortality Trial at Noon on June 8. 35C

![](images/clipboard-3935626096.png)

Mort Reading June 8 at 4pm 3 dead.

June 9 9am - several dead.

June 9 at 9:30 am seemed to blow fuse. 

At 3pm temperature down to 30C with only 1 dead at that time

Leaving overnight.
